overview: A modern, fully responsive 8-page website for Shapetech Solutions with an admin dashboard for content management. Features fluid design with curved sections, dark navy and teal brand colors, and full PDF copy integration across all pages.
features: 8-page website: Home, About, Industries, Shapes, Solutions, Partners, Blog, Contact
Admin dashboard with 14 tabs for content management
Brand-accurate dark navy and teal color scheme
Fluid, curved section design with organic shapes
Fully responsive across mobile, tablet, and desktop
Blog with post listing and detail views
